summary: Filter working-location UI from calendar Upcoming and stop DOM junk fallback.

fixed: Upcoming no longer shows “Change working location” or “Working location: Home” prompts scraped from the calendar grid
Calendar junk filter now checks the title before the first comma, matching Google Calendar aria-labels
DOM scraping skips data-is-picker UI controls and is only used when both API and iCal sync are unavailable
When the session API responds but only working-location events are returned, stale DOM junk is not merged back in
